entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used for inducing sterile mutants.

entities.name: BRAGG
entities.description: A variety of soybean used in the mutation study.

entities.name: TYPE 49
entities.description: A variety of soybean used in the mutation study.

entities.name: GAMMA RAYS
entities.description: Ionizing radiation used to induce mutations.

entities.name: ETHYL METHANESULPHONATE
entities.description: A chemical mutagen used to induce mutations.

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional male gametes.

entities.name: FEMALE FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce functional female gametes and seeds.

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENE
entities.description: A gene that must be homozygous to express the male sterility trait.

entities.name: M2 GENERATION
entities.description: The second generation of plants following mutation treatment.

entities.name: M3 GENERATION
entities.description: The third generation of plants following mutation treatment.
